Brandon Dawson here.
And at this stage of your acquisition journey, I want to tell you about 10X360.
10X360 is an exclusive program catered to businesses making 2MM+ a year.
Whether you’ve acquired a business that has one employee or a team of 1,000, if you are
seeking strategic guidance, expert direction, and proven effective best practices, the 10X360
event will be the catalyst to take you to your next level of success.
Expect to be in a highly energetic and diverse setting with like-minded entrepreneurs,
solopreneurs and executives who are all striving for growth, success, and freedom through
their businesses.
At the 10X360 two-day event, you can expect to be in a highly energetic and diverse setting
with like-minded entrepreneurs, solopreneurs and executives who are all striving for growth,
success, and freedom through their businesses.
Me and my dynamic and experienced Cardone Ventures Executive Team will be leading the
full event and will provide the access, critical thinking, and planning necessary to scale your
business to 10X levels!
This format is not for the faint of heart as attendees will be required to stretch their thinking,
challenge their beliefs, and engage as a major participant in the process. Expect an
environment of:
- High engagement / participation
- Presentations by top executives
- Facilitated workshop-style activities
- Extremely valuable role play opportunities
You will be challenged to think, interact, and respond differently in order to come out the
other side with a clear plan to explosively grow your business.
Click right here to apply.
10X360
